explanations.1: This is a test case definition in BATS (Bash Automated Testing System); the @test decorator marks the following block as a single test with the name in quotes.
explanations.2: The 'run' keyword executes a command (ls simple.bats) and captures its output and exit status for later assertions, rather than running it normally.
explanations.3: This checks that the output matches the regex pattern, where [Ss] means either uppercase or lowercase S, and the backslash escapes the dot so it matches a literal period instead of any character.
